title: "instantsearch.connectors" are not available from the ES build.
body:
**Describe the bug 🐛** I'm trying to implement the AutoComplete functionality using the Vanilla JS InstantSearch. I'm using webpack and I'm getting the following error in my console: ``` app.js:36248 Uncaught ReferenceError: "instantsearch.connectors" are not available from the ES build. To import the connectors: import { connectSearchBox } from 'instantsearch.js/es/connectors' ``` I've already done as described: ``` import { connectSearchBox } from 'instantsearch.js/es/connectors' ``` but the error still exists. Here is my code: ``` import algoliasearch from 'algoliasearch/lite'; import instantsearch from 'instantsearch.js/es' import { searchBox, hits } from 'instantsearch.js/es/widgets'; import { connectAutocomplete } from 'instantsearch.js/es/connectors'; const search = instantsearch({ indexName: 'posts', searchClient: algoliasearch( 'XH97EKBGNS', 'ffd2b688a4c9d620a2ee506cd4f340e4' ), }); search.start(); // Helper for the render function const renderIndexListItem = ({ label, hits }) => `
  • Index: ${label}
      ${hits .map( hit => `
    1. ${instantsearch.highlight({ attribute: 'name', hit })}
      2. ` ) .join('')}
    • `; // Create the render function const renderAutocomplete = (renderOptions, isFirstRender) => { const { indices, currentRefinement, refine, widgetParams } = renderOptions; if (isFirstRender) { const input = document.createElement('input'); const ul = document.createElement('ul'); input.addEventListener('input', event => { refine(event.currentTarget.value); }); widgetParams.container.appendChild(input); widgetParams.container.appendChild(ul); } widgetParams.container.querySelector('input').value = currentRefinement; widgetParams.container.querySelector('ul').innerHTML = indices .map(renderIndexListItem) .join(''); }; // Create the custom widget const customAutocomplete = instantsearch.connectors.connectAutocomplete( renderAutocomplete ); // Instantiate the custom widget search.addWidget( customAutocomplete({ container: document.querySelector('#searchBox'), indices: [ { label: 'Featured', value: 'bestbuy' }, { label: 'Price (desc)', value: 'instant_search_price_desc' }, ], }) ); ``` I have copied and pasted the example from this page: https://www.algolia.com/doc/api-reference/widgets/autocomplete/js/ and I'm still getting that error **Environment:** - OS: Mac OS Mojave - Browser: Chrome - Version: Latest **Additional context** I would really appreciate any assistance on this. I've been digging around the docs and the github issues without any luck. Thanks 🙏
